name: Auntie Babe's Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, cinnamon, sugar, and melted butter. Press into the bottom and sides of a pan.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, then beat in eggs one at a time. Stir in vanilla.
3. Pour the filling mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
5. Turn off the oven and carefully remove the cake from the pan.
6. Prepare the topping by whipping the sour cream. Gradually add sugar and vanilla, then pour over the hot cake.
7. Return the cake to the oven and bake at a very high temperature (around 500°F) for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before refrigerating for at least 24 hours.
